description: Palantir Foundry-style trip planning dashboard — coordinate multi-group trips with convergence maps, itinerary timelines, meal assignments, and expense settlement.
features: Trip setup with emoji cover, dates, destination
Multi-group management with color coding and member lists
Convergence map showing all groups' routes with dashed polylines (Leaflet + CartoDB dark tiles)
Day-by-day itinerary with event types, time slots, and locations
Meal planner with group assignments and cost tracking
Expense tracker with per-group settlement calculation (who owes who)
Mission Launch overlay with readiness checklist
Seed data: Alpine Ridge Weekend trip (SF/LA/Vegas crews)
